creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:

From-To: open->feedback

Hi, thanks for the report. 

Would you try this patch?  It should fix the problem with args. 

http://github.com/knu/postgresql-plruby/commit/3b3cc0786b0814eaa792cec65cedd54e1e43e9bd 

P.S. The original author passed away last year, and I am taking over his projects.
